title: chloraea phoenicea
intro: Chloraea phoenicea, also known as the New Zealand orchid, is a species of flowering plant native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Chloraea phoenicea include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant, making it useful for treating respiratory issues and wound care. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Chloraea phoenicea can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are traditionally used to treat coughs, colds, and bronchitis.
